components.value: V, S, F/DF (chunk of rotten meat)

description.value: This spell summons a single accuser devil from Hell to do the spellcasterâs bidding, similar to how summon monster spells function. Accuser devils, known to diabolists as zebubs, are hideous flying creatures with the torso of a plump human infant and the body and wings of an enormous fly. They make excellent spies, for they have the ability to grant visions of what they have witnessed to othersâthe Queenâs Hands sometimes use summoned zebubs to observe suspects from afar.
